author: NiyamKN33
reviewText: I purchased Quantum Queen MT5 in December 2025 for $1,399. I’ve been running it for a few months on XAUUSD (Gold) across multiple accounts, and so far, so good. What I like is that it feels disciplined and selective — it doesn’t flood the account with trades. It waits for the right conditions and prioritises quality over quantity, which is exactly what I want from an automated Gold system. Setup matters. I followed the product requirements: a hedging account, an ECN/RAW/low-spread broker, and a VPS running 24/7 (mandatory). When you respect these conditions and keep risk sensible, the EA works much more smoothly. After purchase, I messaged the developer (Bogdan Ion Puscasu) and used the installation manual + setup instructions (as mentioned on the product page). That made the setup straightforward and avoided common mistakes. Results: Across my accounts, the EA has generated more profit than what I initially paid for it within a few months (with sensible risk). Of course, no EA is risk-free, and drawdowns can happen, but my experience so far has been positive and consistent enough to keep it running in the long term. Pros: Clean, structured trade logic (not random entries / not “always in the market”). Easy to deploy once set up (install → attach → let it run). Developer support is responsive (Bogdan replies and helps with setup/questions). Cons: Results vary by account size/spread/commission, so performance won’t be identical everywhere. VPS is an extra ongoing cost (but worth it for stability). Use careful risk settings—aggressive settings can increase drawdown, but the EA includes a DD cap option to help limit it. Highly recommended.

author: Julio Faitão
reviewText: I have been using the Quantum Queen MT5 expert advisor since November 2025, and after several months of live trading, I feel confident in sharing my results and experience. Overview: Quantum Queen is an advanced algorithmic trading system designed for the MetaTrader 5 platform. From the start, the setup process was straightforward, and the developer provided clear documentation, which is essential for both beginners and experienced traders. Performance & Profitability: The most impressive aspect of this EA is its consistency. Since I started in November 2025, the bot has been generating an average monthly profit of $1,500. What stands out is not just the final number, but the way it handles market volatility. The trades are executed with precision, and the entry/exit logic seems very well-calibrated to current market conditions. Risk Management: One of my main concerns with automated trading is drawdown. Quantum Queen utilizes a sophisticated filtering system that avoids "dangerous" market setups. Even during high-impact news events, the EA managed to protect my capital while maintaining its steady growth trajectory. Key Highlights: Average Monthly Return: ~$1,500 (based on my specific account size and risk settings). Consistency: It has delivered stable results month after month since late 2025. Execution: Fast and reliable, with no significant slippage issues on MT5. Stability: The algorithm adapts well to different market cycles. Final Verdict: If you are looking for a professional trading tool that prioritizes long-term sustainability over "get-rich-quick" schemes, Quantum Queen MT5 is an excellent choice. Reaching a consistent average of $1,500 per month has exceeded my expectations. I highly recommend it to any MT5 user looking to automate their portfolio with a reliable, high-performing EA.

I want users to spend their time focusing on their lives and long-term strategy, not struggling with complex configurations or unnecessary complications. Quantum Queen was built with a strong emphasis on precise entry and exit logic, filtering out low-quality and high-risk market conditions. reviewText: I started using Quantum Queen MT5 on 5 September, and now, having run it continuously over several weeks, I feel confident sharing my honest impressions—what has impressed me, where I saw challenges, and what I hope to see going forward. What Impressed Me Most 1. Stable and Thoughtful Trade Timing From day one, I noticed the entries and exits feel very calculated—not rushed. Even when market conditions were choppy or indecisive, Quantum Queen refused to force trades. It waited for higher-probability moments. That discipline meant fewer losses and deeper confidence in the EA’s logic. 2. Low Drawdown Behavior & Capital Protection One of my biggest fears with EAs is drawdown spirals. But this one kept floating losses within reasonable bounds and used its internal grid/recovery logic smartly so the account didn’t plunge. The risk control is clearly built in. I felt safer watching it operate. 3. Responsive Support & Care I reached out a couple of times—just to clarify settings, to ask about VPS setup, and to fine-tune risk settings. Each time, the developer replied quickly, respectfully, and with meaningful help. That personal touch means a lot when you entrust software with real money. 4. Real Gains (Even If Modest) Using conservative settings and trading XAUUSD (gold), I recorded steady small gains week by week. Some weeks were modest, especially when price moved sideways, but overall positive. It aligns with many user reviews reporting ~2-3% per week under favorable conditions. The fact that version 2.8 (the current version as per the product page) is updated frequently gives confidence that improvements are ongoing. Final Words & Gratitude Using Quantum Queen MT5 from 5 September until now has been an education in trust, patience, and steady growth. You’ve built an EA that respects capital, limits damage, and seeks quality trades. Your continued support and updates show you regard your users as partners, not just customers. author: KSTshine
reviewText: I've been using the Quantom Queen (QQ) EA for several months now with the "Medium" risk setting. Until recently, I was quite satisfied – the results were consistently profitable, and the bot performed reliably. However, this morning was a real shock: When I checked my account, I had to look twice – there was a drawdown of over 16%, and QQ was still in the trade. There’s no stop loss, and instead, it kept adding to the position (similar to a Martingale strategy), which dramatically increases the risk. This kind of behavior is very dangerous, especially if the market keeps moving against you. I remember seeing another user leave a critical review about this exact issue – and now I'm experiencing the same thing on my own account. I’ll definitely be reconsidering my risk settings. One thing is clear: this level of risk is unacceptable for me, even though the EA has worked well in the past. Conclusion: Be cautious with the risk level and monitor the EA closely. Without a stop loss, things can get out of hand very quickly.
reviewReplyText: Thank you for sharing your detailed feedback — I really appreciate you taking the time to explain your experience. First, I want to clarify that Quantum Queen is a grid-based Expert Advisor, and it’s completely normal for it to open multiple trades in the same direction without a traditional stop loss. This is not a bug or unexpected behavior — this has been its designed strategy from day one, and it’s how it has consistently delivered profitable results since launch. As with any grid EA, temporary drawdowns are part of the strategy, especially during extended market moves or high volatility. What you’re seeing now — including the 16% drawdown — is within expected parameters for the Medium risk setting. If you feel uncomfortable with the 16% drawdown, which I repeat, it's perfectly normal, I would strongly suggest lowering the risk level and the lot size you are trading with. That will make the EA trade more conservatively and help reduce the exposure during market swings. If you need help adjusting the settings or would like a custom configuration to better match your preferences, feel free to reach out anytime. LATER EDIT: The cycle closed with big beautiful profits, like it always does.
